# CSS.AllowDuplicates.txt 知识梳理

> 来源: `CSS.AllowDuplicates.txt` | 字数: 275

## 内容全文

CSS.AllowDuplicates

TYPE: bool

DEFAULT: false

VERSION: 4.8.0

--DESCRIPTION--

<p>

By default, HTML Purifier removes duplicate CSS properties,

like <code>color:red; color:blue</code>.  If this is set to

true, duplicate properties are allowed.

</p>

--# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
